title: Coercer Multi-Protocol Authentication Coercion
description: Detects the Coercer tool, which automates authentication coercion across multiple RPC interfaces (MS-EFSRPC, MS-RPRN, MS-DFSNM, MS-FSRVP, MS-EVEN) to force a target to authenticate to an attacker host for NTLM relay.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*Coercer*' or 'Command Line' like '*coercer.py*' or 'Command Line' like '*EfsRpcEncryptFileSrv*' or 'Command Line' like '*MS-FSRVP*' or 'Command Line' like '*IsPathShadowCopied*')))
